title: Paperclippy
description: Paperclippy is helpful paperclip that follows you around and gives tips
body:
Craft your loyal companion, PaperClippy, with just 2 iron nuggets and a piece of paper! This helpful little friend is ready to assist you in both battles and crafting. Engage in a unique gaming experience with PaperClippy by your side.

After crafting Paperclippy right-click it on the ground to summon your companion. It'll be able to help you fight and craft for now.
